description: Orange and grey backpacknbsp;One non-padded haul loop on the top and two padded and adjustable shoulder straps with tab detail connected with click clasp closures,nbsp;waist strap secured with a click-clasp closure, has a zipped pocketnbsp;Two main zip compartmentsOne has a padded laptop sleeve secured with a Velcro closureAn external zip pocket on the frontA mesh stash pocket with an elasticated mouth on both the sidesHas click-clasp closures and adjustable tabs along the sidesnbsp;Padded mesh backPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 18 monthsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
